title: Diamonds Adrift
actors: Earle Williams, Beatrice Burnham, Otis Harlan
plot: Wealthy shipowner James Bellamy decides to punish his carefree son, Bob, by forcing him to pay his $5,000 in debts by working as a $50-a-month supercargo. In a card game, Bob wins a runaway Persian cat, which is wearing a $30,000 ...
